question: In Wix, how do you add a feedback form section to your webpage?
answer: Click the 'Add' button in the top menu bar, select 'Section' from the dropdown, then choose the 'Feedback Form' template from the left sidebar.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add' button located in the top menu bar of the Wix website editor interface.
From the dropdown menu, the 'Section' option is selected by a mouse click, revealing various section templates.
The cursor hovers over and selects the 'Feedback Form' section template from the list displayed on the left sidebar.

question: In Wix, what fields appear when you add a feedback form section and how do you start modifying its content?
answer: The feedback form section displays fields for 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Email', and 'How can we improve?'. To modify content, click the 'Edit' button within the section.
keypoints: The feedback form section appears on the main editing area of the screen, displaying fields for 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Email', and 'How can we improve?'.
The user clicks on the 'Edit' button within the feedback form section to modify its content.

question: In Wix, how do you edit the feedback form's content and submit user input?
answer: After clicking 'Edit', type your text into the 'How can we improve?' field in the editing panel, then click the 'Send' button at the bottom of the form to submit.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Edit' button within the feedback form section to modify its content.
In the editing panel, the user types 'Improve site colours.' into the text field labeled 'How can we improve?' under the form settings.
The user clicks on the 'Send' button at the bottom of the feedback form to submit the entered information.

question: In Wix, what happens immediately after submitting a feedback form?
answer: A confirmation message 'Thanks for submitting!' appears below the 'Send' button.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Send' button at the bottom of the feedback form to submit the entered information.
A confirmation message 'Thanks for submitting!' appears below the 'Send' button after submission.

question: In Wix, how do you change the background image of a feedback form section?
answer: Click the 'Design' tab in the top menu bar, then select a new design layout from the recommended options in the left sidebar to change the background image.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Design' tab in the top menu bar to customize the appearance of the feedback form section.
The user selects a new design layout from the recommended options shown in the left sidebar, changing the background image of the feedback form section to a laptop and notebook setup.

question: In Wix, how do you publish webpage changes after customizing a feedback form section?
answer: Click the 'Publish' button in the top-right corner of the editor window to make the updated webpage live.
keypoints: The user selects a new design layout from the recommended options shown in the left sidebar, changing the background image of the feedback form section to a laptop and notebook setup.
The user clicks on the 'Publish' button located in the top-right corner of the Wix editor window to publish the updated webpage.

question: In Wix, what appears on the published webpage after updating the feedback form design and publishing changes?
answer: The published webpage displays the feedback form with the updated background image and modified text field content.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Publish' button located in the top-right corner of the Wix editor window to publish the updated webpage.
The published webpage displays the newly designed feedback form with the updated background image and the modified text field.
